subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which of the following kings is considered as the founder of Mewar?
question_hi: मैंवर के महत्त्वाचार्य कौन से संत है?
explanation_en:
Rao Jodha is widely regarded as the founder of Mewar. He established the Mewar kingdom in 11th century and ruled over it with great power and wisdom.

explanation_en.subject: Rajasthan Civil Services
explanation_en.question_en: Who is the founder of Mewar Kingdom?
explanation_en.question_hi: मीवर के किस्तान किस्तान कौन संत है?
explanation_en.explanation_en: Udaipur, the capital city of Mewar Kingdom, was founded by Rao Jodha in the 15th century.
explanation_en.explanation_hi: मीवर के किसिंग के 15वींग मातमकार मेंवर किसिंग के 15वींग मातमकार

explanation_en.subject: Rajasthan History
explanation_en.question_en: Who were the founders of Rajput Rajput clan?
explanation_en.question_hi: राजन कोरवार किंग काचार कोरवार काचार
explanation_en.explanation_en: Prithvir Singh, also known as Prithvir Singh, was the founder of the Rajput Rajput clan in Rajasthan. He established the clan in the 11th century.
